title: doe's ladybug elytra
body:
hi, im doe! first texture pack lol



i wanted an elytra texture pack that was bug/ladybug related and the only things related to bugs that i could find were all just.. too old/not compatible with my game. so my solution: make one! it seemed relatively easy considering all i needed to do was make two 16x16 photos for the item texture & a texture for the actual model, and whatdoya know, i was indeed easy. i made a mcmeta file & an icon for it and im pretty proud about how it all came out!

if you use a lower version of minecraft, the texture pack SHOULD still work.


texture packs used in the gallery:

[yuushya 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/yuushya-16x)

[froggest gui](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/froggest-gui)


do not reupload my texture pack(s) anywhere else and claim it as your own, the only other place it should be is planet minecraft.
